delete_events.description: If true, a task to delete all events associated with this person will be created and queued. The task does not run immediately and instead is batched together and at 5AM UTC every Sunday

delete_recordings.description: If true, a task to delete all recordings associated with this person will be created and queued. The task does not run immediately and instead is batched together and at 5AM UTC every Sunday

distinct_ids.description: A list of distinct IDs, up to 1000 of them. We'll delete all persons associated with those distinct IDs.

ids.description: A list of PostHog person IDs, up to 1000 of them. We'll delete all the persons listed.

keep_person.description: If true, the person record itself will not be deleted. This is useful if you want to keep the person record for auditing purposes but remove events and recordings associated with them
